response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer with deep TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang experience, but the role demands 8 years of C++ programming, 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems, and cloud compute platform leadership. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and there is no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms, large-scale distributed infrastructure, or formal tech-lead mentorship of cloud/DevOps engineers. Domain mismatch is substantial despite solid overall engineering credentials.
strengths: Broad multi-language engineering background with low-latency DLang work at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec
Strong software craftsmanship discipline — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, and mentoring history
Long track record of owning projects end-to-end, including open-source platform (GISCollective) deployable on Kubernetes
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience versus the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed systems leadership experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
